name: circom-merkle
description: Merkle tree membership proof circuit in circom

scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/merkle.r1cs pot12_final.ptau build/merkle_0000.zkey
scripts.prove: snarkjs groth16 prove build/merkle_0000.zkey build/witness.wtns build/proof.json build/public.json
scripts.verify: snarkjs groth16 verify build/verification_key.json build/public.json build/proof.json
